Navbar.promptPurpose: Provide a stylish, professional navigation bar for a security services landing page. It should have a company logo on the left, navigation links in the center (Home, Services, About Us, Contact), and a

button on the right. Use a dark theme with a black background, white text, and an accent color (like cyan or blue) for hover effects. The navbar should be sticky (fixed to top). Include a mobile hamburger icon for responsiveness.

with a subheading explaining the service. Below that, a paragraph describing the company’s mission. There should be two CTA buttons:

. The background should be dark with an image or gradient, and there should be a subtle annotation about trust or security. Include visual elements like security badges or icons to reinforce the theme.

Features.promptPurpose: Design a features/services section that displays 3-4 key services offered by the security company. Each feature should have an icon, title, and brief description. Use a grid layout with cards. The background should be dark, with accent-colored icons or borders. The section should be headed with

Testimonials.promptPurpose: Create a testimonials/social proof section with cards showing customer quotes, ratings, and logos. Each card should have a quote, customer name, title, and possibly a star rating. Use carousel or slider functionality for desktop. Background should be dark with accent quote marks.

Cta.promptPurpose: Design a call-to-action section encouraging visitors to sign up or contact the company. It should have a bold headline, subheading, and a prominent button. The background should be dark with a gradient or pattern. Include a small text below the button for privacy or no-spam guarantee.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a dark-themed footer with multiple columns: company info, quick links, services, and contact info. Include social media icons, newsletter signup, and copyright notice. Background should be dark with light text. Include a divider line between sections.
